issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling scenarios or edge cases such as missing DSN or network failures.

scenarios.name: Next.js source map setup tied to release
scenarios.rationale: Treatment explicitly sets dsn/environment/release together and ties source map upload via @sentry/nextjs webpack plugin to that release; baseline covers source maps but omits release association as core requirement.

scenarios.name: Production sampling + session replay configuration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the 0.1-0.2 tracesSampleRate guidance, both replaysOnErrorSampleRate: 1.0 and replaysSessionSampleRate: 0.1, plus Web Vitals (LCP/CLS/INP) and Sentry.startSpan(); baseline defaults to 1.0 and lacks Web Vitals.
